result:
I’d make it so no one could profit from another’s suffering. Not financially, not politically, not emotionally.

Strip the incentives that turn illness into industry, war into wealth, desperation into leverage. Let the machinery that runs on pain rust out. Wouldn’t fix everything—people would still find ways to hurt each other—but it would sever the feedback loop that turns cruelty into currency. Whole systems would collapse. Others would have to be built. Might be a start.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
